rationale: The cited 2006 paper is a core online-reviews-to-sales study (including stronger effects of one-star reviews), and the citing 2014 paper directly examines whether low ratings from non-purchasers are associated with subsequent revenue declines using a DiD-style comparison by rating. Given this thematic and design overlap in review valence and sales impact, the citation is plausibly foundational/comparative rather than an obvious incidental mention.
